title: More Music
description: Make Minecraft's music play the whole time
body:
# More Music

Have you ever felt that Minecraft's music doesn't play often enough? This mod makes the music play the whole time*.
It also supports configuring the delays between songs, so you can make music play *less* often if you really hate it for some reason.


Minimum and maximum delays (in ticks) between songs for the main menu, normal gameplay, creative mode and the End** can be configured individually.

Requires **Fabric API** (or QFAPI on Quilt) and **Cloth Config API 11.1 or later**, and you probably also want Mod Menu to change the config.

<sup><sub>*There is a delay of 1-2 seconds (20-40 ticks) between songs by default to make the transition less jarring, but you can always change it in the config if you really want.</sub></sup>

<sup><sub>**Excluding the dragon fight, which has a delay of zero by default.</sub></sup>
